text:
Once upon a time, there was a cheerful little squirrel named Sparkly.

Every morning Sparkly would hop up from his cozy pile of pine cones and scamper around the forest looking for lunch. One sunny afternoon, he came across a peculiar-looking flower garden. The flowers were unlike anything he'd ever seen – they sang melodies when he picked them.

"Helloooo, little birdie!" one flower chirped sweetly.

"Helloooo!" Sparkly replied with glee, plucking a single petal from a vibrant marigold.

"Oh, thank you so much!" the flower sung again. "You've given me a shiny red top!"

Sparkly squeaked delightedly. He tucked the petal in his coat.

As Sparkly continued through the garden he met a butterfly named Flutter.

"Hello! Fancy meeting you here!" Flutter fluttered.

"Hello there!" Sparkly chirped. "I just visited a splendid garden!"

Soon another butterfly landed beside them. It was Flutter
